title: Generate static catalog export
goal: Bind the Commonworld static catalog export generator PR as a deterministic, committed proof-export generator without adding API, ingestion, submissions or write paths.

acceptance.assertion: A committed generator produces the static catalog export deterministically from curated seed inputs.
Repository validation fails if the generated proof export drifts from the generator or schema.
The slice does not add API server, database, ingestion worker, public submissions or write paths.

validated_acceptance.deterministic-generator: PR #25 adds deterministic static catalog export generator from curated seed inputs.
validated_acceptance.validation-wired: PR #25 wires generation and validation so committed proof export drift is detected.
validated_acceptance.no-runtime-boundary: PR #25 keeps the no API/database/ingestion/submission/write path boundary.

validation: No API server, database, ingestion worker, public submissions or write path introduced according to PR body and contract boundary.
